name: Shivam Sharma
title: AI Engineer | Agentic AI & LLM Systems | RAG & Multi-Agent Architect
summary: 2nd-year B.Tech AI & ML student building production-grade AI systems — RAG pipelines, multi-agent workflows, and LLM-powered tools. Hands-on experience with LangGraph, LangChain, FastAPI, and Scikit-learn across 6+ end-to-end projects. Passionate about LLM hallucination mitigation, scalable AI infrastructure, and autonomous AI agents for real-world workflows. Open to AI Engineer, LLM Engineer, and MLOps-focused roles (Remote / Hybrid / On-site).

projects.name: Agentic AI Job Search Tool
bullets: Built autonomous AI agent that searches 500+ job listings based on user skills and preferences, reducing manual search time by ~70%.
Implemented multi-agent workflows using LangGraph with planning, memory, and tool usage to analyze job descriptions and extract required skills.
Automated resume tailoring and recruiter email generation using LLM prompts, achieving highly personalized outreach.
Designed notification system to track job applications and status in real-time.

projects.name: Enterprise RAG System
bullets: Built production-grade RAG pipeline supporting 100K+ document indexing with hybrid retrieval achieving <100ms query latency.
Implemented semantic chunking and re-ranking to significantly reduce hallucination rates in LLM responses.
Deployed with FastAPI backend supporting concurrent users with optimized vector search.

projects.name: Neural Search Engine
bullets: Built semantic search engine using vector similarity instead of keyword matching, improving search relevance by ~45% over baseline.
Implemented text preprocessing and embeddings pipeline; designed ranking mechanism using cosine similarity.

projects.name: Neural News Recommendation System
bullets: Developed personalized news recommendation model using similarity-based ranking on large-scale user interaction datasets.
Processed and cleaned 50K+ article records to improve user-specific content relevance and engagement.

projects.name: Credit Card Fraud Detection
bullets: Built ML model to detect fraudulent transactions achieving 97.3% AUC-ROC on highly imbalanced dataset.
Applied SMOTE oversampling and ensemble methods to handle class imbalance effectively.

projects.name: Customer Churn Prediction
bullets: Developed predictive model to identify at-risk customers with 89% precision, enabling proactive retention strategies.
Performed feature engineering across 20+ behavioral signals and evaluated multiple classification algorithms.

projects.name: Samasya-Setu Community Platform
bullets: Built community-driven platform allowing users to post and solve local civic issues with responsive UI.
Implemented problem categorization and upvoting system to prioritize community concerns.

education.institution: Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology

strengths: Production-mindset: Builds systems optimized for real-world deployment, not just prototypes
Deep LLM expertise: Fine-tuning (LoRA/QLoRA/RLHF), RAG, multi-agent orchestration, and MCP integration
Fast learner: Self-driven 2nd-year student with hands-on experience across 6+ end-to-end AI projects
Open Source contributor: Active GitHub profile with AI/ML projects
